subcodes.first_line: O bewildered and abased one! Praise be to the Lord, that through love for that Beloved of all horizons, thou hast rent thy garment and become notorious throughout the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته رسواای حمد کن حضرت دوست را که به عشق آن دلبر آفاق جامه دریدی و رسوای عالم
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @praise and encouragement
